MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN n.prop_1 LIMIT 10
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN n.id, n.prop_1 LIMIT 10
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.age > 20 RETURN n.name, n.age, n.email
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.price >= 100 AND n.price <= 500 RETURN n.product_id, n.price
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.name STARTS WITH "A" RETURN n.id, n.name
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.description CONTAINS "tech" RETURN n.description LIMIT 5
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.email IS NOT NULL RETURN n.id, n.email
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.status IN ["active", "pending"] RETURN n.id, n.status
MATCH (a:label_1)-[r:edge_1]->(b:label_2) RETURN a.name, b.title LIMIT 20
MATCH (a:label_1)-[:edge_1]->(b:label_2) WHERE b.status = "active" RETURN a.id, a.name
MATCH (a:label_1)-[r:edge_1]->(b:label_2) WHERE r.weight > 0.8 RETURN a.id, r.weight, b.id
MATCH (a:label_1)--(b:label_2) WHERE a.name = "value_1" RETURN b.id, b.name LIMIT 5
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.type = "A" OR n.type = "B" RETURN n.id, n.type
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE NOT n.status = "banned" RETURN n.id, n.status LIMIT 10
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN count(n.id)
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.score > 60 RETURN n.name, n.score ORDER BY n.score DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (n:label_1) RETURN DISTINCT n.category
MATCH (n:label_1) WHERE n.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN n.prop_1 LIMIT 1
MATCH p = (n1:label_1)-[e1]-(x)-[e2]-(n2:label_1) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" AND n2.prop_1 <> "value_1" RETURN p LIMIT 1
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[e*1..3]-(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN n1, n2 LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[e*1..3]-(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN n1.prop_1, n2.prop_1 LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[*1..3]->(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN n2.id, n2.name LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[*2..5]->(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.id = "start_node" RETURN n2.name LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[*3]->(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN n2.id, n2.prop_2 LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[:edge_1*1..3]->(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.name = "Alice" RETURN n2.name LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[:edge_1|edge_2*1..4]->(n2:label_2) RETURN n1.id, n2.id LIMIT 10
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[*1..3]->(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.status = "active" AND n2.age > 30 RETURN n1.id, n2.id LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[*1..2]-(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.id = "user_123" RETURN n2.id, n2.name LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[*1..3]->(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "root" RETURN count(n2.id) LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[*1..3]->(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "root" RETURN count(DISTINCT n2.id) LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[e:label_2]->(n2:label_3) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN n1, e, n2 LIMIT 10
MATCH p=(n1:label_1)-[e:label_2*1..3]->(n2:label_1) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" AND n2.prop_1 = "value_3" RETURN n2.prop_1 LIMIT 5

MATCH p = (n1:label_1)-[e1]-(x)-[e2]-(n2:label_1) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" AND n2.prop_1 <> "value_1" RETURN p LIMIT 5 UNION ALL MATCH p = (n1:label_1)-[e1]-(x)-[e2]-(y)-[e3]-(n2:label_1) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" AND n2.prop_1 <> "value_1" RETURN p LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[e:label_2|label_3]->(n2:label_4) RETURN e, n2 LIMIT 5
MATCH (n2:label_4)<-[e4:type_edge]-(n4:type_node) WHERE n4.name = "Alice" RETURN COUNT(e4), COUNT(n4), e4.type ORDER BY COUNT(e4) DESC SKIP 0 LIMIT 5
MATCH (n1:label_1)-[]->(n2:label_2) WHERE n1.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT n2) as count_alias
MATCH p = shortestPath((a:label_1)-[:label_2*1..10]->(b:label_3)) WHERE a.prop_1 = "value_1" RETURN p, length(p) AS depth ORDER BY depth ASC LIMIT 5
MATCH (a:label_1)-[:label_2]->(b:label_3) WHERE a.prop_1 = "value_1" OPTIONAL MATCH (b)<-[:label_4]-(c:label_5) OPTIONAL MATCH (b)<-[:label_6]-(d:label_7) RETURN DISTINCT c.prop_2, d.prop_3 LIMIT 10
MATCH (nodes_1:label_1) WHERE nodes_1.prop_1 = "value_1" WITH nodes_1 MATCH (nodes_1)-[edges_1:label_2]->(nodes_2:label_3) RETURN nodes_2, nodes_1, edges_1 LIMIT 10
MATCH (a:label_1 {prop_1: "value_1"})-[e:label_2]->(n:label_3) WHERE e.prop_2 = "value_2" AND e.prop_4 > "value_3" RETURN n, e.prop_5 LIMIT 10
